hyperedges.label: Schedule Push Pipeline (Settings → SW → Notification Click)
Schedule subsystem persistence via appSettings kv
Slip-note chain mutations (insert / cut / paste / connect / disconnect)
Schedule note save pipeline (parse → diff → pending → flush → Firestore)
App shell setup (root layout + viewport + home)
Admin routes form the Dropbox operator UI
graphCommon helpers shared by both 3D graph routes
CodeNodePanel rendering uses three pure helpers

nodes.label: SW activate — purge old caches + clients.claim
nodes.norm_label: sw activate — purge old caches + clients.claim

nodes.label: SW fetch — network-first + offline SPA fallback
nodes.norm_label: sw fetch — network-first + offline spa fallback

nodes.label: slipClipboard ($state)
nodes.rationale: Ephemeral by design — persisting across reload would be confusing since cut mode mutates IDB at cut-time.

nodes.label: slipNoteGuids snapshot
nodes.rationale: Stays in lock-step with note list cache invalidations so date-arrow adjacency excludes Slip-Box notes whose titles parse as dates.

nodes.label: enableNotifications() (gesture-first iOS)
nodes.rationale: iOS Safari requires Notification.requestPermission as the first await after a click event for the prompt to count as user-trusted.

nodes.label: syncScheduleFromNote()
nodes.rationale: Single entry point for editor save hook to compute schedule deltas without uploading.

nodes.label: parseScheduleNote()
nodes.rationale: Processes both current and next month so 1st-of-month summaries don't miss prepared events.

nodes.label: Apple Touch Icon (PNG required for iOS PWA)
nodes.norm_label: apple touch icon (png required for ios pwa)

nodes.label: Static codegraph JSON assets (/codegraph.json + meta + communities)
nodes.norm_label: static codegraph json assets (/codegraph.json + meta + communities)
